steps.title: Find the example clue
steps.content: The passage includes the note “One is at Bear Trap Meadow.” which points to a specific SNOTEL site.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content: Choice B names the SNOTEL site at Bear Trap Meadow, giving a concrete example. The other choices discuss data collection, Julie Koeberle’s role, or general location without naming an actual site. That matches choice B — B is correct.
